selectItemDescription: Select an item in the file tree on the left to view its contents
createFolderDescription: Create your first folder to start organizing notes
mobileWorkspaceDescription: Small screens work better with notes and folders. Graphs stay hidden here so the interface remains fast and easy to scan.
graphUnavailableTitle: Graphs are not available on mobile
graphUnavailableDescription: Open a note or folder on a larger screen to view and work with the graph without restrictions.
graphUnavailableHint: Mobile screens show notes and folders only
